title: rhus × ashei
intro: Rhus × ashei, also known as the sweet acacia, is a hybrid plant species that belongs to the Anacardiaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Rhus × ashei include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and acting as an antiseptic. The herbal preparations of Rhus × ashei include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by drying the leaves and branches of the plant, and then infusing them in hot water or a solvent like ethanol.
